title: build(deps): bump github.com/containernetworking/plugins from 0.8.2 to 0.8.3
body:
Bumps [github.com/containernetworking/plugins](https://github.com/containernetworking/plugins) from 0.8.2 to 0.8.3.
Release notes *Sourced from [github.com/containernetworking/plugins's releases](https://github.com/containernetworking/plugins/releases).* > ## CNI Plugins v0.8.3 > This is v0.8.3 of the CNI community plugins. This release has a number of enhancements and bugfxies. > > Many thanks to our contributors who make CNI possible. > > Enhancements: > - static: prioritize the input sources for IPs ([#400](https://github-redirect.dependabot.com/containernetworking/plugins/pull/400)). > - tuning: send gratuitous ARP in case of MAC address update ([#403](https://github-redirect.dependabot.com/containernetworking/plugins/pull/403)). > - bandwidth: use uint64 for Bandwidth value ([#389](https://github-redirect.dependabot.com/containernetworking/plugins/pull/389)). > - ptp: only override DNS conf if DNS settings provided ([#388](https://github-redirect.dependabot.com/containernetworking/plugins/pull/388)). > - loopback: When prevResults are not supplied to loopback plugin, create results to return ([#383](https://github-redirect.dependabot.com/containernetworking/plugins/pull/383)). > - loopback support CNI CHECK and result cache ([#374](https://github-redirect.dependabot.com/containernetworking/plugins/pull/374)). > > > Better input validation: > - vlan: add MTU validation to loadNetConf ([#405](https://github-redirect.dependabot.com/containernetworking/plugins/pull/405)). > - macvlan: add MTU validation to loadNetConf ([#404](https://github-redirect.dependabot.com/containernetworking/plugins/pull/404)). > - bridge: check vlan id when loading net conf ([#394](https://github-redirect.dependabot.com/containernetworking/plugins/pull/394)). > > Bugfixes: > - bugfix: defer after err check, or it may panic ([#391](https://github-redirect.dependabot.com/containernetworking/plugins/pull/391)). > - portmap: Fix dual-stack support ([#379](https://github-redirect.dependabot.com/containernetworking/plugins/pull/379)). > - firewall: don't return error in DEL if prevResult is not found ([#390](https://github-redirect.dependabot.com/containernetworking/plugins/pull/390)). > - bump up libcni back to v0.7.1 ([#377](https://github-redirect.dependabot.com/containernetworking/plugins/pull/377)). > > > Tests: > - integration: fix ip address collision in integration tests ([#409](https://github-redirect.dependabot.com/containernetworking/plugins/pull/409)). > - testutils: newNS() works in a rootless user namespace ([#401](https://github-redirect.dependabot.com/containernetworking/plugins/pull/401)). > - Bump Go version ([#386](https://github-redirect.dependabot.com/containernetworking/plugins/pull/386)). > - Cleanup netns after test suite ([#375](https://github-redirect.dependabot.com/containernetworking/plugins/pull/375)). > > Docs: > - contributing doc: revise test script name to run ([#396](https://github-redirect.dependabot.com/containernetworking/plugins/pull/396)). > - contributing doc: describe cnitool installation ([#397](https://github-redirect.dependabot.com/containernetworking/plugins/pull/397)).
Commits - [`d5efdfe`](https://github.com/containernetworking/plugins/commit/d5efdfe1f6d6e8e9e9494e3f43be54f76c0f8fd6) Merge pull request [#409](https://github-redirect.dependabot.com/containernetworking/plugins/issues/409) from squeed/fix-integ-tests - [`05f121a`](https://github.com/containernetworking/plugins/commit/05f121a4061cdc9e1b0de213fd0f8d05ed6de3df) integration: fix ip address collision in integration tests - [`825fbd8`](https://github.com/containernetworking/plugins/commit/825fbd8a9553aa12c2bd98e2a31272e5a0195fe1) Merge pull request [#405](https://github-redirect.dependabot.com/containernetworking/plugins/issues/405) from mars1024/feat/vlan_mtu_validation - [`1a30688`](https://github.com/containernetworking/plugins/commit/1a30688da02733aea171eeec4d2fab57b3b8a4ec) add some testcases about invalid MTUs - [`bee8d6c`](https://github.com/containernetworking/plugins/commit/bee8d6cf302d0f962fa2bc6274eb154139de6926) vlan: add MTU validation in loadNetConf - [`a162329`](https://github.com/containernetworking/plugins/commit/a16232968de47358d64322763fe0d7ed57ec382e) Merge pull request [#400](https://github-redirect.dependabot.com/containernetworking/plugins/issues/400) from s1061123/fix/overwrite-ips - [`1880421`](https://github.com/containernetworking/plugins/commit/1880421389ec34ec2b9df833391be10b5582dc19) Merge pull request [#401](https://github-redirect.dependabot.com/containernetworking/plugins/issues/401) from giuseppe/run-in-a-userns - [`a2ed3d9`](https://github.com/containernetworking/plugins/commit/a2ed3d9a696733916845802b9a88b3e70a333cda) Merge pull request [#403](https://github-redirect.dependabot.com/containernetworking/plugins/issues/403) from s1061123/dev/addgarp - [`7bcaae2`](https://github.com/containernetworking/plugins/commit/7bcaae263fcb72e7a3360ecc3584e50a970315c0) Merge pull request [#404](https://github-redirect.dependabot.com/containernetworking/plugins/issues/404) from mars1024/feat/mtu_validation - [`e1f955d`](https://github.com/containernetworking/plugins/commit/e1f955d9bfc85916755923141b05514d21d71726) macvlan: add MTU validation to loadNetConf - Additional commits viewable in [compare view](https://github.com/containernetworking/plugins/compare/v0.8.2...v0.8.3)

[![Dependabot compatibility score](https://api.dependabot.com/badges/compatibility_score?dependency-name=github.com/containernetworking/plugins&package-manager=go_modules&previous-version=0.8.2&new-version=0.8.3)](https://dependabot.com/compatibility-score.html?dependency-name=github.com/containernetworking/plugins&package-manager=go_modules&previous-version=0.8.2&new-version=0.8.3) Dependabot will resolve any conflicts with this PR as long as you don't alter it yourself. You can also trigger a rebase manually by commenting `@dependabot rebase`. [//]: # (dependabot-automerge-start) [//]: # (dependabot-automerge-end) ---
Dependabot commands and options
You can trigger Dependabot actions by commenting on this PR: - `@dependabot rebase` will rebase this PR - `@dependabot recreate` will recreate this PR, overwriting any edits that have been made to it - `@dependabot merge` will merge this PR after your CI passes on it - `@dependabot squash and merge` will squash and merge this PR after your CI passes on it - `@dependabot cancel merge` will cancel a previously requested merge and block automerging - `@dependabot reopen` will reopen this PR if it is closed - `@dependabot close` will close this PR and stop Dependabot recreating it. You can achieve the same result by closing it manually - `@dependabot ignore this major version` will close this PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for this major version (unless you reopen the PR or upgrade to it yourself) - `@dependabot ignore this minor version` will close this PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for this minor version (unless you reopen the PR or upgrade to it yourself) - `@dependabot ignore this dependency` will close this PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for this dependency (unless you reopen the PR or upgrade to it yourself) - `@dependabot use these labels` will set the current labels as the default for future PRs for this repo and language - `@dependabot use these reviewers` will set the current reviewers as the default for future PRs for this repo and language - `@dependabot use these assignees` will set the current assignees as the default for future PRs for this repo and language - `@dependabot use this milestone` will set the current milestone as the default for future PRs for this repo and language - `@dependabot badge me` will comment on this PR with code to add a "Dependabot enabled" badge to your readme Additionally, you can set the following in your Dependabot [dashboard](https://app.dependabot.com): - Update frequency (including time of day and day of week) - Pull request limits (per update run and/or open at any time) - Out-of-range updates (receive only lockfile updates, if desired) - Security updates (receive only security updates, if desired)

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **NOT APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *dependabot-preview[bot]* To complete the [pull request process](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process), please assign **umohnani8** You can assign the PR to them by writing `/assign @umohnani8` in a comment when ready. The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Flibpod).
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - **[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/master/OWNERS)** Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

Hi @dependabot-preview[bot]. Thanks for your PR.

I'm waiting for a [containers](https://github.com/orgs/containers/people) member to verify that this patch is reasonable to test. If it is, they should reply with `/ok-to-test` on its own line. Until that is done, I will not automatically test new commits in this PR, but the usual testing commands by org members will still work. Regular contributors should [join the org](https://github.com/orgs/containers/people) to skip this step.

Once the patch is verified, the new status will be reflected by the `ok-to-test` label.

I understand the commands that are listed [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Flibpod).

<details>

Instructions for interacting with me using PR comments are available [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/pull-requests.md).  If you have questions or suggestions related to my behavior, please file an issue against the [kubernetes/test-infra](https://github.com/kubernetes/test-infra/issues/new?title=Prow%20issue:) repository.
</details>
Closing as it doesn't pull in new code.

OK, I won't notify you again about this release, but will get in touch when a new version is available. If you'd rather skip all updates until the next major or minor version, let me know by commenting `@dependabot ignore this major version` or `@dependabot ignore this minor version`.

If you change your mind, just re-open this PR and I'll resolve any conflicts on it.
